summary: Hydrated state leaves #59362 as the only open candidate and best live canonical for the regular Windows exec console-window flash family. #70197 is already closed and tracks a related but distinct Bonjour/ciao ARP gateway flash root cause. No security-sensitive refs were identified, and no close/comment/label mutation is planned.

actions.reason: Keep #59362 open as the canonical live tracker. Do not close it in this run because the issue has an unhydrated comment and no hydrated candidate fix PR ref is available for a safe fixed-by closeout.
Already closed in live state; keep it as related historical evidence only.
